examples: This furnace puts out 5000 BTUs of heat. That engine is really throwing off some heat. Removal of heat from the liquid caused it to turn into a solid.

definitions.text: The condition or quality of being hot.
examples: Stay out of the heat of the sun!

definitions.text: To cause an increase in temperature of (an object or space); to cause to become hot .

examples: There's a pot of soup heating on the stove.

definitions.text: To excite or make hot by action or emotion; to make feverish.
simple past and past participle of heat
